hooks.command: cd /home/user/GenesysDemoProject && git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null && git checkout origin/main -- CLAUDE.md HANDOFF.md 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Syncing CLAUDE.md and HANDOFF.md from main...

hooks.command: REPO=/home/user/GenesysDemoProject && cd "$REPO" && git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null && mkdir -p "$REPO/.worktrees" && git worktree add "$REPO/.worktrees/main" origin/main 2>/dev/null && cp "$REPO/CLAUDE.md" "$REPO/HANDOFF.md" "$REPO/.worktrees/main/" && cd "$REPO/.worktrees/main" && git add CLAUDE.md HANDOFF.md && (git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "Session end: sync docs to main" && git push origin HEAD:main 2>/dev/null)) ; git worktree remove "$REPO/.worktrees/main" --force 2>/dev/null ; rmdir "$REPO/.worktrees" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Syncing CLAUDE.md and HANDOFF.md to main...
